name: Yunnan Steamed Pot Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Rice wine or dry sherry
DIPPING SAUCES - Light soy sauce, Chili bean sauce, Chopped scallions
recipeInstructions:
To make this soup, use a Yunnan ceramic steam pot or a heat-proof casserole with an internal spout.
1. Blanch the chicken for 3 minutes in boiling water.
2. Remove and rinse the chicken in cold running water.
3. Place chicken pieces around the pot or on a rack in the casserole.
4. Sprinkle salt over the chicken, scatter ginger pieces and scallions.
5. Pour in the chicken stock and rice wine or sherry.
6. Cover and gently steam on the stove for 2 hours, replenishing hot water as needed.
7. Remove ginger and scallion pieces. Skim off surface fat with a spoon.
8. Serve soup in a tureen with chicken on a platter, accompanied by dipping sauces. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
